objective: List three good practices for keeping a lab notebook in a teaching environment.
final_response: Three simple practices: record dates and your name on each page; write procedures before you start and note observations as you go; keep raw data and sketches even if you later summarize them.

conversation.original_value: List three good practices for keeping a lab notebook in a teaching environment.
Three simple practices: record dates and your name on each page; write procedures before you start and note observations as you go; keep raw data and sketches even if you later summarize them.
